languages.text: "Конечно, я подожду. Однако без образцов полет на Амсанкт не имеет смысла — без них я не смогу помочь Нунциусу".
"Of course, I can wait. However, without the samples, the journey to Amsanct is futile — without them, I cannot help Nuncius."
languages.original_text: "Конечно, я подожду. Однако без образцов полет на Амсанкт не имеет смысла — без них я не смогу помочь Нунциусу".

traits.locale_text: "Of course, I can wait. However, without the samples, the journey to Amsanct is futile — without them, I cannot help Nuncius."
"Of course, I can wait. However, without the samples, the journey to Amsanct is futile — without them, I cannot help Nuncius."
"Of course, I can wait. However, without the samples, the journey to Amsanct is futile — without them, I cannot help Nuncius."

languages.text: «Por supuesto, puedo esperar. Sin embargo, sin esas muestras el viaje a Amsanct sería inútil, ya que las necesito para ayudar a Nuncius».
languages.original_text: "Of course, I can wait. However, without the samples, the journey to Amsanct is futile — without them, I cannot help Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: «Por supuesto, puedo esperar. Sin embargo, sin esas muestras el viaje a Amsanct sería inútil, ya que las necesito para ayudar a Nuncius».

languages.text: “当然，我可以等。不过，要是没有那些样本，去阿姆桑克特也不过是徒劳——没有它们，我根本救不了努恩修斯。”
languages.original_text: "Of course, I can wait. However, without the samples, the journey to Amsanct is futile — without them, I cannot help Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: “当然，我可以等。不过，要是没有那些样本，去阿姆桑克特也不过是徒劳——没有它们，我根本救不了努恩修斯。”

languages.text: « Bien sûr, je peux attendre. Cependant, sans ces échantillons, il serait futile de nous rendre sur Amsanct. Ils me sont indispensables pour aider Nuncius. »
languages.original_text: "Of course, I can wait. However, without the samples, the journey to Amsanct is futile — without them, I cannot help Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr, je peux attendre. Cependant, sans ces échantillons, il serait futile de nous rendre sur Amsanct. Ils me sont indispensables pour aider Nuncius. »

languages.text: "Elbette bekleyebilirim. Ancak numuneler olmadan Amsanct'a yapılacak yolculuk beyhude olur. Onlarsız Nuncius'a yardım edemem."
languages.original_text: "Of course, I can wait. However, without the samples, the journey to Amsanct is futile — without them, I cannot help Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette bekleyebilirim. Ancak numuneler olmadan Amsanct'a yapılacak yolculuk beyhude olur. Onlarsız Nuncius'a yardım edemem."

languages.text: "Natürlich. Ich kann warten. Ohne die Proben ist die Reise nach Amsanct allerdings sinnlos ... ohne sie kann ich Nuncius nicht helfen."
languages.original_text: "Of course, I can wait. However, without the samples, the journey to Amsanct is futile — without them, I cannot help Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich. Ich kann warten. Ohne die Proben ist die Reise nach Amsanct allerdings sinnlos ... ohne sie kann ich Nuncius nicht helfen."

languages.text: 「もちろん、待つことはできる。しかし、サンプルがなければ、アムサンクトへの旅は無駄になる。サンプルがなければ、ヌンキウスを助けることはできない。」
languages.original_text: "Of course, I can wait. However, without the samples, the journey to Amsanct is futile — without them, I cannot help Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん、待つことはできる。しかし、サンプルがなければ、アムサンクトへの旅は無駄になる。サンプルがなければ、ヌンキウスを助けることはできない。」
